name: Build with Claude
what_it_does: Curated discovery hub and plugin marketplace for the Claude ecosystem, aggregating 117 agents, 175 slash commands, 28 hooks, 26 skills, 50 bundled plugins, 20,000+ community plugins, 4,500+ MCP servers, and 1,100+ marketplaces into a searchable web interface with one-click installation support.
use_cases: Discovering Claude Code plugins, agents, and slash commands
Finding MCP servers for specific integrations
Browsing curated collections of Claude ecosystem tools
Installing plugins via the plugin marketplace command
not_for: Users of non-Claude AI platforms (OpenAI, Gemini, etc.)
Production MCP server hosting or deployment
Building custom MCP servers (this is discovery, not creation)
Teams needing vetted enterprise-grade plugin security reviews
best_when: You're working in the Claude ecosystem (Claude Code, Claude Desktop, Agent SDK) and want to discover, browse, and install community plugins, agents, skills, and MCP servers from a centralized hub.
avoid_when: You use non-Claude AI platforms, need production-grade plugin security vetting, or want to build rather than discover MCP tools.

auth.notes: No authentication required. Web interface and plugin installation are open access.

pricing.notes: Fully open source under MIT license. Free web interface at buildwithclaude.com. No paid features.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: This is a discovery/marketplace platform, not an MCP server. No MCP tools are exposed. Error handling is limited to web UI interactions.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Not applicable - this is a discovery platform, not a service with API endpoints.
known_agent_gotchas: Not an MCP server itself - it's a directory/marketplace for discovering Claude ecosystem tools
Plugin installation relies on /plugin marketplace command which may not be available in all Claude Code versions
Community plugins listed are not security-vetted - install at your own risk
20,000+ community plugins are aggregated from external sources with varying quality
Plugin format requirements may change as Claude Code evolves
Manual installation requires copying files to specific Claude directories

security_score_components.security_notes: Community/specialized tool. Apply standard security practices for category. Review documentation for specific security requirements.
